infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FITS MeetTrack AI needs microphone access to record your meetings.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: FITS MeetTrack AI uses speech recognition to transcribe your meeting in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FITS MeetTrack AI needs location access to capture meeting location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FITS MeetTrack AI needs location access to capture meeting location.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FITS MeetTrack AI to use your location.

plugins.microphonePermission: FITS MeetTrack AI needs microphone access to transcribe your meetings.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: FITS MeetTrack AI uses speech recognition to generate meeting minutes in real-time.
